label: Native Codex App
description: Operator-mediated Codex App run using native App tools and UI affordances.
affordances: Native App tools, terminal, Git UI, and thread UI

operatorInstructions: Open or create a Codex App thread rooted at the target cwd.
Use the App normally, including native App tools where useful.
Do not invoke codex-toys-only workflows unless the prompt itself discovers them naturally.
